security.profile.mfa.recovery.storageHin: Keep your recovery codes as safe as your password. We recommend saving them with a password manager such as 1Password, Authy, or Keeper.
security.profile.mfa.recovery.title: Recovery codes
security.profile.mfa.recovery.warning: Store these codes in a safe place. You will not be able to view them again.
security.profile.mfa.recovery.warningStr: Keep your recovery codes in a safe spot. These codes are the last resort for accessing your account in case you lose your password and second factors. If you cannot find these codes, you will lose access to your account.
